prompt: We want to migrate our networking layer from Retrofit+OkHttp to Ktor. It currently lives in :app module mixed in with UI fragments and ViewModels. There are 5 service files (UserService.kt, OrderService.kt, ProductService.kt, PaymentService.kt, AuthService.kt) plus a RetrofitClient.kt setup file. ProGuard rules reference some of these classes. Please analyze and recommend an approach.

assertions.text: Agent recommends extracting networking code to a dedicated Gradle module as preparation step
ProGuard/R8 keep rules referencing service classes are flagged as hidden consumers
Agent identifies Retrofit/OkHttp-specific artifacts (converters, interceptors, authenticators) that need to be replaced with Ktor equivalents
Migration plan includes a PR breakdown (e.g., PR 1: module extraction, PR 2: Ktor implementation, PR 3: cleanup)
